prompt: A dreamy editorial fashion photograph of a minimalist young woman sitting gracefully on the roof of a vintage pastel pink Porsche 356, photographed from a dramatic low-angle perspective against an enormous towering cumulus cloud filling the background. The composition emphasizes vast negative space with a rich deep-blue summer sky, creating a peaceful, cinematic atmosphere. She wears a clean white raglan T-shirt with light gray sleeves, oversized navy wide-leg linen trousers, and simple brown leather slide sandals. Short dark bob haircut gently tousled by the breeze, subtle silver earrings and bracelet, relaxed natural makeup, calm contemplative expression with closed or softly gazing eyes.
